# Parkside Advisory Group

Parkside Advisory Group helps businesses use practical AI and workflow automation to reduce manual work, improve follow-up, and create clearer operational visibility.

Primary site: https://parksideag.com

## Core Pages

- Home: https://parksideag.com/
- Services: https://parksideag.com/services
- AI Operations Blueprint: https://parksideag.com/blueprint
- Use Cases: https://parksideag.com/use-cases
- About: https://parksideag.com/about
- Intake: https://parksideag.com/intake
- Privacy: https://parksideag.com/privacy

## Primary Offer

AI Operations Blueprint: a focused review that maps one recurring workflow, identifies practical automation opportunities, and recommends the first system to build.

## Services

- AI Operations Blueprint
- Workflow Automation Sprint
- AI Agent Build
- AI Operations Retainer

## Common Use Cases

- client intake automation
- lead and customer follow-up
- reporting visibility
- internal handoffs
- recurring document and email drafting
- workflow triage

## Guardrails

Parkside does not publish fixed pricing on the website. Pricing depends on discovery, workflow complexity, current tools, data readiness, and implementation scope.
